name: WF1 - CargoLink Broadcast Request to Forwarders

parameters.query: SELECT full_name, email FROM users WHERE sovereign_id = '{{ $json.user_sovereign_id }}'
SELECT * FROM forwarders WHERE status = 'APPROVED' OR status = 'ACTIVE'

INSERT INTO forwarder_bid_status (forwarder_id, request_id, status, attempted_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.forwarder_id }}', '{{ $json.request_id }}', 'PENDING', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (forwarder_id, request_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'PENDING', attempted_at = NOW()

parameters.subject: ✅ Your request {{ $json.request_id }} is live - {{ $json.total_notified }} forwarders notified!
parameters.message:
✅ Request Broadcasted!

Dear {{ $json.user_name }},

Your request {{ $json.request_id }} has been posted on CargoLink!

{{ $json.total_notified }}

Forwarders Notified

You will receive quotations within 24-48 hours. The request closes after 3 quotes.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO n8n_events_logs (event_type, request_id, description) VALUES ('REQUEST_BROADCASTED', '{{ $('Code - Create Summary').first().json.request_id }}', 'Broadcasted to {{ $('Code - Create Summary').first().json.total_notified }} forwarders') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "success": true, "request_id": $('PostgreSQL - Read Request').first().json.request_id, "forwarders_notified": $('Code - Create Summary').first().json.total_notified, "message": "Request broadcasted successfully" } }}
